description: A core_ordering_sequence Mystery Chamber instance (infinite_stacks.md S10, S24.4) mid-solve, in the REAL wire shape docs/INFINITE_STACKS_CONTRACTS.md S5.2 defines (StacksEngineAdapter.project()'s puzzles[room_id]): two objects' fallback/accessible prose (always visible -- objects are never gated behind an inspect action, only private-clue claiming is), one hint already revealed, an in-progress attempt, and TWO private clues assigned to this viewer (the key object's clue pool can hand a hero more than one fragment across separate breach/inspect claims). Wire shape for state.puzzles[room_id] (core/selectors.js selectPuzzleView). items[] carries the orderable solution items (wave-3 close: lexicographic-by-item_id on the wire, provably independent of the solution order) that the submission picker builds real submit_solution payloads from.

objects.fallback: A brass-plated index card, clearly labeled.
objects.accessible: Object: anchor. A brass-plated index card with a position stamped on it.

objects.fallback: A bundle of index cards tied together with binding thread.
objects.accessible: Object: key. A bundle of index cards connected by binding thread, each thread showing which card leads into which.

objects.fallback: A card with a torn, half-legible label.
objects.accessible: Object: contradiction. A card with an old, torn label that no longer applies.

objects.fallback: A dusty ledger noting when each card was last reshelved.
objects.accessible: Object: red herring. A dusty ledger recording reshelving dates -- true, but not required to solve the puzzle.

hints_revealed.fallback: Focus on the anchor: the brass-plated card sits at shelf position 1.
hints_revealed.accessible: Hint 1: the anchor card is at position 1.

your_private_clues.fallback: A binding thread runs from the brass-plated card straight into the torn-label card.
your_private_clues.accessible: Key clue: the brass-plated card sits immediately before the torn-label card.

your_private_clues.fallback: A binding thread runs from the torn-label card straight into the dusty ledger's card.
your_private_clues.accessible: Key clue: the torn-label card sits immediately before the dusty ledger's card.

items.accessible: Orderable item: the dusty ledger's card.
